phases.description: Analyze Repo A, scaffold Repo B's core architecture, and configure Cloudflare bindings.
success_criteria: Wrangler types generated successfully
Astro, Hono, and Honi dependencies verified
Global path aliases established in tsconfig.json

implementation_plan.title: Initial Setup
implementation_plan.description: Set up paths, bindings, and fetch legacy data.

architecture.explanation: Standard Cloudflare Worker with Astro assets.
architecture.mermaid_diagram: graph TD; A[Astro] --> B[Worker Assets]; B --> C[Hono Router];

instructions: Add D1, DO, and AI bindings.
Add Secrets Store binding references for API keys.
Add global import paths (e.g., '@/*' mapping to './src/*').

tasks.task_description: Configure wrangler.jsonc, tsconfig.json paths, and generate types.
cloudflare_docs_queries: What is the wrangler.jsonc syntax for D1 and Durable Objects bindings?

steps.title: Configure wrangler.jsonc
technical_requirements: Set compatibility_date to today
Add DB, ASSETS, and AdvisorAgent bindings
Add AI Gateway configuration
success_criteria: wrangler.jsonc is valid

steps.title: Generate Types
technical_requirements: Run pnpm run types or npx wrangler types
success_criteria: worker-configuration.d.ts is generated and Env interface is globally available
Types exist and tsconfig.json has path aliases

phases.description: Port the monolithic Drizzle schema into modular files (one per table), verify against live DB, and generate migrations.
success_criteria: All tables from the provided monolithic schema are modularized into src/backend/db/schemas/{table_name}.ts
drizzle-kit generate successfully creates migration files
Live DB sample completes successfully

implementation_plan.title: DB Porting & Modularization
implementation_plan.description: Break down the massive schema.ts into domain-specific, individual table files.

architecture.explanation: Drizzle ORM over D1, strict one-file-per-table structure.

instructions: Extract traces and traceEvents table schemas

manual_verification: Sample existing DB using env API/Account keys

tasks.task_description: Convert the monolithic schema into separate files per table inside src/backend/db/schemas/.
cloudflare_docs_queries: Drizzle ORM setup for D1 sqlite dialect

steps.title: Create Observability Schemas
technical_requirements: Create logs.ts, traces.ts, traceEvents.ts, systemHealthTests.ts
success_criteria: Files exist and export valid SQLite Drizzle tables

steps.title: Create User & Realtor Domain Schemas
technical_requirements: Create marketSnapshots.ts, trackedProperties.ts, buyerPreferences.ts, userPreferenceProfiles.ts, agentChatLogs.ts, userFeedbackEvents.ts
success_criteria: Files exist and export valid SQLite Drizzle tables

steps.title: Create Raw Ingestion & Transport Schemas
technical_requirements: Create rawHdbResalePrices.ts, rawHdbPropertyInfo.ts, rawLtaMrtStations.ts, rawGovMarketsHawkerCentres.ts, etc.
success_criteria: Files exist and export valid SQLite Drizzle tables

steps.title: Create AI, Policy & Enriched Schemas
technical_requirements: Create userInsights.ts, policyPages.ts, enrichedHdbBlocks.ts, hdbScoreLah.ts, aiPropertyListings.ts, etc.
success_criteria: Files exist and export valid SQLite Drizzle tables

requirements: Strictly one file per table or tight logical pairing (e.g., traces + traceEvents in traces.ts is acceptable if strictly related, but 1-to-1 is preferred).
success_criteria: Schema is fully modularized

tasks.task_description: Sample the live DB to verify schema matches, then generate Drizzle migrations.

steps.title: Live DB Sample
technical_requirements: Write a temporary script to sample the remote D1 DB to ensure columns match your new schema files.
success_criteria: Schema accurately reflects live data

steps.title: Generate Migrations
technical_requirements: Run 'npm run db:generate'
success_criteria: SQL files appear in drizzle/ directory
Migrations generated successfully

phases.description: Implement the core AI logic using the `honidev` framework, routing via AI Gateway and leveraging MCP tools.
success_criteria: AdvisorAgent DO compiles
Honi API routes mounted via Hono
AI Gateway Client integrated

implementation_plan.title: Honi Port
implementation_plan.description: Build the AI layer using honidev.

architecture.explanation: Honi agents running in DO, calling models via AI Gateway.
architecture.mermaid_diagram: graph TD; A[Hono] --> B[Honi API]; B --> C[Durable Object]; C --> D[AI Gateway Client]; D --> E[LLM];

tasks.task_description: Use honidev to build the agent, integrate AI Gateway, and add tools.
cloudflare_docs_queries: How to bind Durable Objects to a Worker?

steps.title: Implement Agent
technical_requirements: Import from 'honidev'
Set memory to use DO (working) and D1 (episodic)
Ensure AI model calls route through src/lib/ai/utils/ai-gateway-client.ts
success_criteria: Agent logic is complete

steps.title: Implement Browser Render Tool
technical_requirements: Add a researchCondo tool leveraging src/lib/cloudflare/browser.ts to scrape live info.
success_criteria: Browser render tool is attached to the Honi agent

steps.title: Expose MCP Endpoints
technical_requirements: Expose /mcp and /sse endpoints in the Hono router for external AI clients.
success_criteria: MCP endpoints are functional

requirements: Do not use Vercel AI SDK or legacy agents package.
success_criteria: Honi agent exported successfully with tools.

phases.description: Convert Stitch HTML mockups into Astro pages and shadcn/ui React Islands.
success_criteria: Astro application deployed with dark theme
Stitch mockups converted to shadcn/ui
MCP Tester and Chat UI functional

implementation_plan.title: Astro + shadcn UI
implementation_plan.description: Build out the frictionless frontend using islands architecture.

architecture.mermaid_diagram: graph TD; A[Astro Pages] --> B[React Islands]; B --> C[Hono Backend];

manual_verification: Run npm run dev and inspect the UI visually.

tasks.task_title: Build Astro Pages and Retrofit Mockups
tasks.task_description: Pull down Stitch mockups and convert them to shadcn/ui components in Astro.

steps.title: Global Layout & Sidebar
technical_requirements: Enforce <html class='dark'>
Build persistent sidebar navigation linking to all routes.
success_criteria: Layout is styled correctly in dark mode

steps.title: Retrofit Stitch Mockups
technical_requirements: Translate all raw HTML elements from mockups to shadcn/ui React components (e.g. <Button>).
Use client:load for interactive islands.
success_criteria: No raw tailwind HTML buttons exist, only shadcn components

steps.title: Build MCP Tester Interface
technical_requirements: Build /mcp-tester with a 2-column layout to select tools, input JSON, and view raw output.
success_criteria: MCP Tester can execute tools successfully

requirements: Frictionless frontend (no auth required for users).
success_criteria: Frontend compiles and matches mockups functionally.

phases.description: Finalize observability, health dashboards, and deploy to Cloudflare.
success_criteria: Dashboard shows live DB traces
Deployment pipeline succeeds

implementation_plan.title: Deployment
implementation_plan.description: Ensure observability works and ship to production.

architecture.mermaid_diagram: graph TD; A[Local] -->|npm run deploy| B[Cloudflare Edge];

steps.title: Dashboard Observability
technical_requirements: Ensure /dashboard island fetches from D1 traces and healthLogs schemas to display system status.
success_criteria: Dashboard renders trace data

steps.title: Execute Deployment
technical_requirements: Run 'npm run build && npm run migrate:remote && npx wrangler deploy'
success_criteria: Live application URL is accessible
Project successfully ported and live.
